text:
is the 7th ending theme of the Attack on Titan anime, composed and performed by Ai Higuchi.

It replaced Shock in Episode 76 and was replaced by Itterasshai in Episode 88.

An instrumental version, titled serves as the music-only ending of Episode 82.

Complete version

 

 

Ending animation

A young Eren, wearing his red scarf, walks across a field of white flowers. A drop of blood falls on one of the flowers. His scarf unwraps itself and transforms into a gold-colored bird, which soars through the clouds and starry sky.

However, dark clouds emerge and surround the bird, eventually turning into a bird cage. The bird dissipates into stars, which fall on Eren, who is trapped in the cage. To the child's wonder, the cage disappears, and Eren is surrounded by a field with blooming flowers. Various locales in Paradis Island, including Trost District and Utgard Castle, are seen as dilapidated and seemingly abandoned ruins overtaken by nature.

A now adult Eren walks forward freely in this field. He is engulfed in a flame of various colors, and as he turns to look back, he vanishes.
